hooks.command: echo '## Current Build Phase' && echo '' && grep -A1 -E '^[|] [0-9]' learning-goals.md | head -20 && echo '' && echo '## Next Unchecked Goals' && echo '' && grep -B1 -e '- \[ \]' learning-goals.md | grep '^###' | head -5 && echo '' && echo '## Checked Goals' && echo '' && grep -B1 -e '- \[x\]' learning-goals.md | grep '^###' | head -20 || echo 'No goals checked yet'
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.rs$' && rustfmt "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
